titleStmt.title: SII 23.220: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 220. (A.R. No. 220 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi Temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 30: 1042-43 A.D.

summary.p: This is mutilated and also built in at both its ends. It seems to register a taxfree sale of 5 vēli and odd of land made by the Mūlaparishat of Śeyñalūr in Miḻailaināḍu to the temple of Tribhuvanapati-Mahēśvara at Tiruviḍaimarudūr after receiving 500 kāśu. With this land the Management proposed to provide for worship and offerings to the image of Umāpati Ēkanāyaka set up in the temple by a certain Veṇkāḍaṉ Śaṅkaraṉ alias Rājarāja-Viḻupparaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—maiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velaittol peruṅkāval pala paḻantivum ceruviṟ cinavi Irupattorukāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=ti mattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaṟku muṭiyum payaṅkoḷ paḻipaṭu mucaṅkiyal mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun navaṉetikkulap perumalaikaḷum viracakkarakoṭṭamum paṭarvallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅka nāmaṇaikko ṇaiyum virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉm mācuṉitecamum paya cel kulattintira palataṉattoṭun naṟkula taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ cerimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcer naṟkocalaina tanma pālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇa cūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṉaikirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=ta can=taṉ ṉamar viḻin=toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamuntorukaḻal caṅkuvoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi piṭiyalyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nattilane ttaralāṭamum cāḻal Ūralil viccātirattoraṇamum meytta tarumuṭika tarum niṟai śrī vicaiyamum tuṟainā yāṟ naṟpaṉaiyum maṉ ḻ cūḻ māyiruṭi ṟpuṉal māpappāḷamu—
—poḻil māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10Āvatu rājentira ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu miḻalaināṭṭu ceyññalūr mūlaparaṭaiyom Uyyak koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tribhuvaṉapati maheśvaradevarkku Iṟaiyiliāvaṇañ ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu O� ṭai Uṭaintu Eṅkaḷūr māṉa keṭṭu Eṅkaḷūrkku Iṟai Iṟukkamāṟṟāmaiyil vaiykka Ittevar paṇ ṭārattu kācu 5 100 Ikkācu Aññūṟuṅ koṇṭu Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra— coḻanallūr Uṭaiyāṉ veṇkāṭaṉ caṅkaraṉāṉa rāja rāja viḻupparaiyaṉ Ikkoyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Umāpatit tirumeṉi Ekanāyakarkkut tiruvamutuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅ kaḷukku Eṅkaḷūr muṉpu vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṉṟa nilat tukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai mā nilattukkum rājarājapperuvāykkā lukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāṇi kūt tallap peruvāyk kālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ṭaiyār nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Iṉnilam Aiñce yeḻumā mukkāṇiyum mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka Inṉilattukku veṇṭum cil kuṭukkakkaṭavom—
Digital edition of SII 23.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
